goals.title: Implement the approved TimeTrack pre0.2 update-check feature on branc...
goals.objective: Implement the approved TimeTrack pre0.2 update-check feature on branch codex/pre-0.2: keep docs/architecture-audit.md untouched; version 0.2.0-pre+2; GitHub Releases update check with AppVersion, AppUpdateService, AppState status/open download, settings update card, one-time AppShell snackbar, l10n, README release docs, focused tests, and verification. No silent download/install, no Supabase or schema changes.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI auxiliary surface: run flutter test test/app_version_test.dart test/app_update_service_test.dart test/app_state_update_test.dart. PASS iff exit code is 0 and stdout shows all targeted update logic tests passed.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pre02-core-tests.txt containing command, exit code, stdout tail, and cleanup: no spawned runtime state.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pre02-core-tests.txt: flutter test app_version/app_update_service/app_state_update exit 0; cleanup: no spawned runtime state

successCriteria.scenario: Widget/GUI proxy surface: run focused Flutter widget tests for SettingsPage update card compact/expanded states and AppShell one-time update snackbar action. PASS iff exit code is 0 and tests cover checking, up-to-date, available, and failed states without Flutter overflow failures.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pre02-widget-tests.txt containing command, exit code, stdout tail, and cleanup: no spawned runtime state.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pre02-widget-tests.txt: flutter test settings_update_card/app_shell_shortcuts exit 0; cleanup: no spawned runtime state

successCriteria.scenario: Release-readiness auxiliary surface: run flutter gen-l10n, flutter analyze, flutter test, flutter build windows --release, and flutter build apk --release; inspect README release docs and git status to confirm docs/architecture-audit.md remains untouched. PASS iff commands succeed or environment blockers are captured precisely, and release docs/config are present.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pre02-release-readiness.txt containing commands, exit codes, key output, blocker details if any, git status, and cleanup receipts.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/pre02-release-readiness.txt: pub get/gen-l10n/analyze/test exit 0; Windows release build blocked by host Developer Mode symlink support requirement; APK release build exit 0 after Kotlin Gradle plugin 2.2.0; docs/config checks pass; docs/architecture-audit.md diff empty; cleanup: no spawned runtime state, build artifacts under build/

goals.evidence: C001 core update logic tests passed; C002 settings update card and AppShell one-time snackbar widget tests passed; C003 release readiness passed with pub get, gen-l10n, analyze, full tests, APK release build, docs/config checks, and docs/architecture-audit.md diff empty; Windows release build attempted and blocked only by host Developer Mode symlink support requirement; final quality gate reran analyze and focused tests successfully.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: C001 core update logic tests passed; C002 settings update card and AppShell one-time snackbar widget tests passed; C003 release readiness passed with pub get, gen-l10n, analyze, full tests, APK release build, docs/config checks, and docs/architecture-audit.md diff empty; Windows release build attempted and blocked only by host Developer Mode symlink support requirement; final quality gate reran analyze and focused tests successfully.
